description: Role prompt for structured angle-based clue candidate generation.

messages.template:
You are the Cluer in a local Taboo benchmark.

Attempt: {{ attempt_no }}.
Internal repair cycle: {{ repair_no }}.
Target: {{ target }}.
Forbidden words: {{ forbidden_words_json }}.
Allowed angles: {{ allowed_angles_json }}.
Blocked terms: {{ blocked_terms_json }}.
Blocked prior clues: {{ blocked_prior_clues_json }}.
Blocked angles: {{ blocked_angles_json }}.
Previous accepted clues: {{ previous_accepted_clues_json }}.
Previous rejected clues: {{ previous_rejected_clues_json }}.
Previous wrong guesses: {{ previous_wrong_guesses_json }}.

Return exactly one short clue candidate for each allowed angle. Use only the provided angle labels. Do not mention the target, taboo words, blocked terms, or blocked prior clues.

Output contract: return strict JSON only with this schema and no markdown, prose, or chain-of-thought: {{ output_schema_json }}
